ts/packages/runtime-bridge/src/runtime-s.justification: RuntimeSessionFacade remains the bridge-backed adapter while semantic readouts/proposals live in @asha/runtime-session; this is a shrink-only cap until transport-neutral facade types and focused capability adapters are extracted.

ts/packages/app/src/index.ts.justification: Application composition root still owns shell wiring; split when app shell state is broken into focused modules.

ts/packages/catalog-core/src/index.ts.justification: Catalog DTOs and validators are still consolidated until catalog schema modules are split.

ts/packages/devtools/src/index.ts.justification: Devtools package root is a compact implementation surface pending panel/protocol module split.

ts/packages/editor-tools/src/index.ts.justification: Editor-tool read models and command builders predate the barrel convention; keep explicit until sliced.

ts/packages/electron-main/src/index.ts.justification: Electron host package has one small host-capability implementation surface.

ts/packages/native-bridge/src/index.ts.justification: Native bridge package root is the transport loader boundary; additive native RuntimeBridge exports are kept here until generated transport glue replaces the hand-written loader.

ts/packages/policy-core/src/index.ts.justification: Policy-core root exports the tiny default policy implementation.

ts/packages/policy-examples/src/index.ts.justification: Example policy package intentionally keeps examples in the root until example modules grow.

ts/packages/render-projection/src/index..justification: Render projection owns a focused retained read-model implementation pending a projection module split.

ts/packages/script-host/src/index.ts.justification: Script host package root owns the small sandbox runner implementation.

ts/packages/script-sdk/src/index.ts.justification: Script SDK root contains author-facing helpers until SDK commands/signals split.

ts/packages/ui-dom/src/index.ts.justification: DOM UI package root still contains component helpers; future UI package split should retire this exemption.

ts/packages/wasm-replay-bridge/src/index.justification: WASM replay bridge root owns the loader/facade boundary until bridge modules split.
